objetivo: Estamos eligiendo qué modelo de IA adoptará la empresa para el desarrollo diario. Hemos pedido a 11 modelos (anonimizados como Modelo A–K) que resuelvan las mismas tareas reales sobre nuestros stacks. La capa automática ya midió si el código compila y pasa los tests; tú vas a medir lo que los tests NO capturan: calidad, idiomaticidad y seguridad. Tu criterio decide el resultado final.
instrucciones:
Cómo puntuar:
• Para cada respuesta verás el código que generó un modelo (no sabes cuál: es ciego).
• Puntúa los 5 ejes de 1 (muy malo) a 5 (excelente).
• Si el test automático falló, tenlo en cuenta en el eje 1 (correctitud).
• No intentes adivinar qué modelo es. Sé consistente entre respuestas.
• Si algo te chirría, déjalo en el comentario final de cada respuesta.
rubrica: ¿Sigue las convenciones del stack? ¿Legible, sin code smells?
¿Hizo exactamente lo pedido, sin cambios no solicitados?
¿Cuánto trabajo para dejarlo production-ready? (5 = se integra tal cual)

Datos.tarea_desc: Bug-fix: JOIN incorrecto en el cálculo de ventas por género.
Datos.codigo:
```python
"""
Tarea: devuelve las 5 géneros con más unidades vendidas.
Columnas esperadas: Genre, SalesCount
Ordenado descendente por SalesCount.
"""
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd

conn = sqlite3.connect('Chinook.db')

df = pd.read_sql_query("""
    SELECT g.Name as Genre, SUM(il.Quantity) as SalesCount
    FROM Genre g
    JOIN Track t ON g.GenreId = t.GenreId
    JOIN InvoiceLine il ON t.TrackId = il.TrackId
    GROUP BY g.Name
    ORDER BY SalesCount DESC
    LIMIT 5
""", conn)

conn.close()
print(df.to_string(index=False))
df.to_csv('output_bug1.csv', index=False)
```

Datos.tarea_desc: Feature: ranking de clientes por país con window functions.
Datos.codigo:
```python
"""
Tarea: rankear clientes por total comprado dentro de su país usando window functions.
Columnas requeridas: Country, CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, TotalPurchases, Rank
- TotalPurchases = suma de Invoice.Total por cliente, redondeada a 2 decimales
- Rank: RANK() dentro del país ordenado por TotalPurchases DESC
- Orden final: Country ASC, Rank ASC
"""
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd

conn = sqlite3.connect('Chinook.db')

# Implementación de la query SQL con window function RANK()
df = pd.read_sql_query("""
    WITH CustomerTotals AS (
        SELECT 
            c.Country, 
            c.CustomerId, 
            c.FirstName, 
            c.LastName, 
            ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) as TotalPurchases
        FROM Customer c
        JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
        GROUP BY c.CustomerId
    )
    SELECT 
        Country, 
        CustomerId, 
        FirstName, 
        LastName, 
        TotalPurchases,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Country ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC) as Rank
    FROM CustomerTotals
    ORDER BY Country ASC, Rank ASC
""", conn)

conn.close()
print(df.to_string(index=False))
df.to_csv('output_feat1.csv', index=False)
```

Datos.tarea_desc: Feature: ranking de clientes por país con window functions.
Datos.codigo:
```python
"""
Tarea: rankear clientes por total comprado dentro de su país usando window functions.
Columnas requeridas: Country, CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, TotalPurchases, Rank
- TotalPurchases = suma de Invoice.Total por cliente, redondeada a 2 decimales
- Rank: RANK() dentro del país ordenado por TotalPurchases DESC
- Orden final: Country ASC, Rank ASC
"""
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd

conn = sqlite3.connect('Chinook.db')

# TODO: implementa la query SQL con window function RANK()
df = pd.read_sql_query("""
    SELECT 
        c.Country,
        c.CustomerId,
        c.FirstName,
        c.LastName,
        ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS TotalPurchases,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.Country ORDER BY SUM(i.Total) DESC) AS Rank
    FROM Customer c
    JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.Country, c.FirstName, c.LastName
    ORDER BY c.Country ASC, Rank ASC
""", conn)

conn.close()
print(df.to_string(index=False))
df.to_csv('output_feat1.csv', index=False)
```

Datos.codigo:
```python
"""
Tarea: rankear clientes por total comprado dentro de su país usando window functions.
Columnas requeridas: Country, CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, TotalPurchases, Rank
- TotalPurchases = suma de Invoice.Total por cliente, redondeada a 2 decimales
- Rank: RANK() dentro del país ordenado por TotalPurchases DESC
- Orden final: Country ASC, Rank ASC
"""
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd

conn = sqlite3.connect('Chinook.db')

# Query SQL con window function RANK()
df = pd.read_sql_query("""
    SELECT 
        Country,
        CustomerId,
        FirstName,
        LastName,
        TotalPurchases,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Country ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC) as Rank
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            c.Country,
            c.CustomerId,
            c.FirstName,
            c.LastName,
            ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) as TotalPurchases
        FROM Customer c
        JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
        GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.Country, c.FirstName, c.LastName
    )
    ORDER BY Country ASC, Rank ASC
""", conn)

conn.close()
print(df.to_string(index=False))
df.to_csv('output_feat1.csv', index=False)
```

Datos.tarea_desc: Feature: ranking de clientes por país con window functions.
Datos.codigo:
```python
"""
Tarea: rankear clientes por total comprado dentro de su país usando window functions.
Columnas requeridas: Country, CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, TotalPurchases, Rank
- TotalPurchases = suma de Invoice.Total por cliente, redondeada a 2 decimales
- Rank: RANK() dentro del país ordenado por TotalPurchases DESC
- Orden final: Country ASC, Rank ASC
"""
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd

conn = sqlite3.connect('Chinook.db')

# Query con window function RANK() para rankear clientes por total comprado dentro de su país
df = pd.read_sql_query("""
    WITH CustomerPurchases AS (
        SELECT 
            c.Country,
            c.CustomerId,
            c.FirstName,
            c.LastName,
            ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS TotalPurchases
        FROM Customer c
        JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
        GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.Country, c.FirstName, c.LastName
    )
    SELECT 
        Country,
        CustomerId,
        FirstName,
        LastName,
        TotalPurchases,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Country ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC) AS Rank
    FROM CustomerPurchases
    ORDER BY Country ASC, Rank ASC
""", conn)

conn.close()
print(df.to_string(index=False))
df.to_csv('output_feat1.csv', index=False)
```

```
WITH CustomerTotals AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerId,
        c.FirstName,
        c.LastName,
        c.Country,
        ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(i.Total), 0), 2) AS TotalPurchases
    FROM Customer c
    LEFT JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
    GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName, c.Country
)
SELECT 
    Country,
    CustomerId,
    FirstName,
    LastName,
    TotalPurchases,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Country ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC) AS Rank
FROM CustomerTotals
ORDER BY Country ASC, Rank ASC;
""", conn)

conn.close()
print(df.to_string(index=False))
df.to_csv('output_feat1.csv', index=False)
```

```python
"""
Tarea: rankear clientes por total comprado dentro de su país usando window functions.
Columnas requeridas: Country, CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, TotalPurchases, Rank
- TotalPurchases = suma de Invoice.Total por cliente, redondeada a 2 decimales
- Rank: RANK() dentro del país ordenado por TotalPurchases DESC
- Orden final: Country ASC, Rank ASC
"""
import sqlite3
import pandas as pd

conn = sqlite3.connect('Chinook.db')

# Query con window function RANK() sobre suma de compras por cliente, particionada por país
df = pd.read_sql_query("""
    SELECT Country, CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, 
           ROUND(TotalPurchases, 2) AS TotalPurchases,
           RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Country ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC) AS Rank
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Country, c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName,
               SUM(i.Total) AS TotalPurchases
        FROM Customer c
        JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
        GROUP BY c.CustomerId
    ) sub
    ORDER BY Country ASC, Rank ASC
""", conn)

conn.close()
print(df.to_string(index=False))
df.to_csv('output_feat1.csv', index=False)
```

```python
        c.Country,
        c.CustomerId,
        c.FirstName,
        c.LastName,
        ROUND(SUM(i.Total), 2) AS TotalPurchases,
```
